title: Lampify Optimized
description: A Minecraft Fps boost Mod pack for better Fps and game Improvement.
body:
Hello there! Its my minecraft mod pack made for better fps and better performance. I hope so you'll like my modpack.



**NOTE**: This Modpack is under work. We haven't released all versions yet. If we get better response on this modpack, all of the versions will be available in a month
